## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check . && ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `mypy src` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the behavior change (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for testing conventions)
- [ ] Docs updated if this changes public behavior (README / docs/)
